snippets.comment: Her interactive teaching style made the class engaging and encouraged participation. She cares about her students, respects them, and shows genuine passion for her job. She was approachable and explained the material clearly, helping students understand difficult concepts.
Professor Khamo clearly cares about anthroplogy. She is compassionate and makes the class fun for the students!

Seriously one of the best teachers I've ever had. She's really passionate about anthropology and it shows. The discussions in class were really amazing. She doesn't force you to participate, and I was lucky enough to have a talkative class so it made it fun. Her class made the semester really great
